channel.title: Authentication on Sujith Quintelier
channel.description: Recent content in Authentication on Sujith Quintelier

item.title: github: GitHub App installation tokens: Per-request override header
item.description:
GitHub is rolling out a new GitHub App installation token format and is providing a per-request override header so developers can validate apps and workflows before the rollout completes.

  • Source: GitHub

item.title: azure: [Launched] Generally Available: Managed Identity Support for Azure Files SMB Is now GA
item.description:
Azure Files SMB now supports Managed Identities in general availability. Applications and services can authenticate to Azure Files without storing static credentials or account keys, using Entra-issued tokens instead.

  • Source: Azure Updates

item.title: security: When configuration becomes a vulnerability: Exploitable misconfigurations in AI apps
item.description:
Microsoft Security describes how misconfigurations in cloud-native AI apps on Kubernetes can expose user interfaces, weaken authentication, and create risky defaults that lead to remote code execution and data leakage. The post frames configuration mistakes as a security issue rather than a deployment convenience.

  • Source: Microsoft Security Blog
